jsonLd.title: Babyoye is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Babyoye:
Babyoye is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
